parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ intent: 'eli.triage_email', agent: 'eli', suite_id: $json.suite_id || $env.DEFAULT_SUITE_ID, office_id: $json.office_id || $env.DEFAULT_OFFICE_ID, request_id: $json.requestId, correlation_id: $json.correlationId, payload: { email_id: $json.email_id, from: $json.from, subject: $json.subject, body_preview: $json.body_preview } }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ receipt_id: 'n8n-eli-triage-' + Date.now() + '-' + Math.random().toString(36).slice(2, 8), suite_id: $('Kill Switch + HMAC + Prep').item.json.suite_id || 'ffffffff-0000-0000-0000-system000000', tenant_id: 'system', office_id: ($env.DEFAULT_OFFICE_ID || $env.DEFAULT_SUITE_ID || 'ffffffff-0000-0000-0000-system000000'), receipt_type: 'n8n_agent', status: 'SUCCEEDED', correlation_id: $('Kill Switch + HMAC + Prep').item.json.correlationId, actor_type: 'SYSTEM', actor_id: 'n8n-eli-email-triage', action: { action_type: 'agent.eli.triage_email', risk_tier: 'yellow', email_id: $('Kill Switch + HMAC + Prep').item.json.email_id }, created_at: new Date().toISOString() }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ receipt_id: 'n8n-eli-triage-killed-' + Date.now() + '-' + Math.random().toString(36).slice(2, 8), suite_id: ($env.DEFAULT_SUITE_ID || 'ffffffff-0000-0000-0000-system000000'), tenant_id: 'system', office_id: ($env.DEFAULT_OFFICE_ID || $env.DEFAULT_SUITE_ID || 'ffffffff-0000-0000-0000-system000000'), receipt_type: 'n8n_agent', status: 'SKIPPED', correlation_id: 'n8n-eli-email-triage-killed-' + new Date().toISOString().slice(0, 10), actor_type: 'SYSTEM', actor_id: 'n8n-eli-email-triage', action: { action_type: 'agent.eli.triage_email', reason: ($json.reason || 'kill_switch_disabled') }, created_at: new Date().toISOString() }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ receipt_id: 'n8n-eli-triage-fail-' + Date.now() + '-' + Math.random().toString(36).slice(2, 8), suite_id: ($env.DEFAULT_SUITE_ID || 'ffffffff-0000-0000-0000-system000000'), tenant_id: 'system', office_id: ($env.DEFAULT_OFFICE_ID || $env.DEFAULT_SUITE_ID || 'ffffffff-0000-0000-0000-system000000'), receipt_type: 'n8n_agent', status: 'FAILED', correlation_id: 'n8n-eli-email-triage', actor_type: 'SYSTEM', actor_id: 'n8n-eli-email-triage', action: { action_type: 'agent.eli.triage_email' }, result: { error_message: $json.message || 'Email triage failed' }, created_at: new Date().toISOString() }) }}
